description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal drum with a weathered and heavily rusted exterior, commonly found as discarded industrial waste in urban environments. The drum features a prominent white band around its middle, adorned with a black, stylized flower emblem reminiscent of a cherry blossom. The surface is mottled with patches of rust, corrosion, and chipped paint, giving it a neglected and aged appearance. The top of the drum has two circular openings, likely for pouring or venting, and the rim is slightly raised. The overall color palette is dominated by dark gray, brownish rust, and white, with the emblem providing a stark visual contrast. The drum's size and construction suggest it was once used for storing or transporting liquids such as oil or chemicals.
description: A large, rusted metal drum with a white band and a black flower emblem, featuring heavy corrosion and two top openings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white band with a black flower emblem clearly visible, along with significant rust and corrosion on the upper and lower sections.
description_view_1: This side view lacks any emblem, displaying extensive rust and weathering across the entire surface, especially on the upper half.
description_view_2: Another side view with no emblem visible, showing a more even distribution of rust and chipped paint, with the white band still apparent.
description_view_3: Back view highlights the drum's rough, corroded texture and the absence of any markings or emblems, with rust patches concentrated on the upper section.
attribute_brand_logo: A black, stylized cherry blossom flower emblem centered on the white band.
attribute_rust_or_damage_marks: Extensive rust and corrosion cover the surface, especially on the upper and lower sections, with chipped paint and weathering throughout.
